summary: A recorded Fox News interview from 2021, posted by the account holder, in a three-box layout. A male host sits at left, the interviewee (America First Legal founder and former White House adviser) joins by video in the center before a night city skyline, and at right is aerial b-roll labeled 'RIO GRANDE VALLEY, TX' showing a line of people standing in a dirt lot beside white pickup trucks. A lower-third chyron reads 'BIDEN ADMIN PAYS $87 MILLION TO HOUSE ILLEGAL MIGRANTS IN HOTELS' with a Fox News bug. The narration concerns federal contracts to house newly arrived migrants. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Three-box layout: a male host at left, the interviewee by video center before a night skyline, aerial b-roll at right labeled 'RIO GRANDE VALLEY, TX' of people lined up in a dirt lot by white pickups; chyron 'BIDEN ADMIN PAYS $87 MILLION TO HOUSE ILLEGAL MIGRANTS IN HOTELS'.
The interview continues in the same layout as the guest speaks to camera.

notable_text: RIO GRANDE VALLEY, TX; BIDEN ADMIN PAYS $87 MILLION TO HOUSE ILLEGAL MIGRANTS IN HOTELS; FOX NEWS PRIMETIME
